    • loadJson

      protected void loadJson(String json_file) throws IOException

      IOException

    • loadJson

      protected void loadJson(Path json_file) throws IOException
      Loads JSON content from a specific file into a JSON tree for parsing
      Parameters:
      json_file -
      Throws:
      IOException

    • searchArrayForPair

      protected com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode searchArrayForPair(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode starting, String child_key, String child_value) throws JSONReader.ConstantParseError
      Searches through a JSON array to find a specific key value pair
      Parameters:
      starting - the starting json node to search from
      child_key - the primary key to look for
      child_value - the value of the primary key
      Returns:
      the node that contains child_key with the value of child_value
      Throws:
      JSONReader.ConstantParseError - when node is not an array or child_key and value cannot be found

    • walkTree

      protected static com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode walkTree(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode starting, String... path_steps)
      Walks the JSON tree down to a specific node
      Parameters:
      path_steps - a list of path steps to take along the way
      Returns:
      the resulting node at the end of walking

    • getChildren

      protected static ArrayList<String> getChildren(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode parent)
